description: A comparison of the role of law and legal institutions in the U.S. and other countries, with a focus on the state's use of law to achieve its political goals. Not open to students with credit for POLI SCI 617 prior to fall 2017

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: POLI SCI 120,182, orLEGAL ST/​POLI SCI  217or (POLI SCI 106 or 186 taken prior to fall 2017) or graduate standing
